title: First Degree Murder
description: A person commits first degree murder when they kill an individual without lawful justification

title: Aggravated Assault
description: Commits an assault while armed with a dangerous weapon or causes bodily harm

title: Domestic Battery
description: Intentionally causes bodily harm to any family or household member

title: Robbery
description: Takes property from the person or presence of another by the use of force or by threatening use of force

title: Armed Robbery
description: Commits robbery while armed with a dangerous weapon

title: Theft
description: Knowingly obtains or exerts unauthorized control over property of the owner

title: Burglary
description: Without authority knowingly enters or remains within a building with intent to commit a felony or theft

title: Possession of Cannabis (30g-100g)
description: Unlawful possession of cannabis over 30 grams but less than 100 grams

title: Possession of Controlled Substance
description: Unlawful possession of a controlled substance

title: Driving Under the Influence (DUI)
description: Operating a vehicle while under the influence of alcohol or drugs

title: Reckless Driving
description: Driving with willful or wanton disregard for the safety of persons or property

title: Driving with Suspended License
description: Driving while license is suspended or revoked

title: Criminal Damage to Property
description: Knowingly damages property of another

title: Unlawful Use of Weapons
description: Carries or possesses a firearm without required permit or in prohibited location

title: Aggravated Unlawful Use of a Weapon
description: Carries a loaded, uncased firearm on public way by person without FOID card

title: Resisting a Peace Officer
description: Knowingly resists or obstructs the performance by a peace officer

title: Disorderly Conduct
description: Acts in an unreasonable manner causing alarm or disturbing the peace

title: Stalking
description: Follows or places under surveillance another person on at least 2 occasions

title: Cyberstalking
description: Uses electronic communication to stalk, harass, or intimidate another person

title: Identity Theft
description: Uses personal identifying information of another to fraudulently obtain credit, goods, or services
